column1: SQL     THEN 'Services Contracts Agency Interim Consultants'

SQL on da.client = t.client and tr.dim_a = da.dim_value and da.attribute_id = '08'

SQL on db.client = t.client and tr.dim_c = db.dim_value and db.attribute_id = '10'
